package api

func (s *Server) apiRoutes() []route {
	return []route{
		// ── widgets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
		// Widgets are the fixture's stand-in for a real section. This prose belongs to
		// the FIRST route only.
		//
		// Second paragraph, still prose.
		//oapi:summary List the widgets
		//oapi:example resp [{"name": "a"}]
		{pattern: "GET /api/widgets", cap: caps.WidgetsView, scope: scopeAny, h: s.handleListWidgets},

		//oapi:summary Create a widget
		//oapi:status 201
		//oapi:enum WidgetRequest.kind round|square
		//oapi:required WidgetRequest.name WidgetRequest.kind
		//oapi:example req {
		//  "name": "a",
		//  "kind": "round"
		//}
		{pattern: "POST /api/widgets", cap: caps.WidgetsEdit, scope: scopeGlobal, h: s.handleCreateWidget},

		// ── gadgets ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
		{pattern: "GET /api/gadgets/{id}/logs", cap: caps.GadgetsView, scope: scopeEnv, h: s.handleGadgetLogs},

		//oapi:path action enum=start|stop what to do to the gadget
		//oapi:query force boolean skip the safety check
		//oapi:deprecated superseded by POST /api/gadgets/{id}/ops
		{pattern: "POST /api/gadgets/{id}/{action}", cap: caps.GadgetsEdit, scope: scopeEnv, h: s.handleGadgetAction},
	}
}
